name: Codespace + Tailscale ExitNode + Node + Python + Git
postCreateCommand:
(curl -fsSL https://tailscale.com/install.sh | sh) > /tmp/tailscale.log 2>&1 \
&& sudo tailscaled --tun=userspace-networking --state=/tmp/tailscale.state > /dev/null 2>&1 & sleep 3 \
&& sudo tailscale up --authkey=tskey-auth-kzBupQZ4Q611CNTRL-5eYGQRy9VA8aoHgxVvGFA8MHL15BT19oK --accept-routes --exit-node=CodeSpace-ExitNode
